title: Quality Of Voxy
description: Performance and quality of life mods with voxy
body:
# 🌌 **Quality Of Voxy**

Experience Infinite Horizons without compromising on FPS.

Quality Of Voxy is a next-generation optimization and QoL (Quality of Life) pack built around the revolutionary Voxy engine. While most packs focus on just performance, we focus on the view. Watch your Minecraft world stretch out to the horizon with infinite render distance, all while maintaining buttery-smooth frame rates.
 🚀 **Key Features**

_**🔭 The Voxy Revolution (LODs)**_

By utilizing the Voxy mod, this pack allows you to see miles beyond the vanilla render distance limit.

    Infinite View: See distant mountains and structures without the lag of traditional chunk loading.

    Smart Performance: Built-in C2ME and Sodium integration ensures your CPU and GPU stay cool while rendering massive landscapes.

 ⚡ _**Extreme Optimization Stack**_

We've included the "Holy Trinity" of performance mods, fine-tuned for version 1.21.1:

    Sodium & Lithium: The gold standard for frame rates and server-side logic.

    ImmediatelyFast & Entity Culling: Drastically improves rendering speed for entities and UI.

    FerriteCore & Dynamic FPS: Minimizes RAM usage and saves resources when the game is tabbed out.

 🛠️ _**Enhanced Quality of Life (QoL)**_

Minecraft, but better. No fluff, just pure utility:

    Essential Mod: Play with friends without needing a dedicated server!

    Trade Cycling & Visible Traders: Maximize your villager trading efficiency.

    Zoomify: The most advanced and smooth zoom tool available.

    Shulker Box Tooltip & AppleSkin: Instant information at your fingertips.

    InvMove: Move and jump while your inventory is open.

 🎨 _**Visual Excellence**_

    Complementary Shaders (Reimagined): Pre-included and optimized for Voxy.

    Iris Shaders: The fastest shader loader in existence.

    LambDynamicLights: Hold a torch and light up the darkness in real-time.

    Unique Dark: A sleek, modern dark mode UI for a premium feel.

 🎮 **Why "Quality Of Voxy"?**

Many performance packs make the game look "flat" to save FPS. Quality Of Voxy does the opposite. We use modern rendering techniques to make the game look better than vanilla while running faster than vanilla.

# _Bugs:_

If your system language is not English, or if Java is running with a non-English locale (for example Turkish), Minecraft may crash on startup due to a bug introduced in the latest Sodium update. This happens because Sodium currently does not fully handle locale-specific characters during initialization.

To fix this issue, force Java to use the English (US) locale by adding the following JVM arguments to your launcher: **_-Duser.language=en -Duser.country=US_**
